raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The percentage of voter signatures needed to produce a regular recall for districts of all sizes is at a much higher threshold than what is needed for recalls of appointed board members.",
    "For smaller school and community districts, a recall can severely threaten their financial stability.",
    "The cost of holding a special election can total a significant percentage of a small school district's annual budget.",
    "A petition of only 90 signatures triggered a special election to recall an appointed Board Member of the Cloverdale Unified School District, adding almost $100,000 to the district's deficit.",
    "A special election for the Dublin Unified School District Board was held costing $76,000 after 75 signatures were gathered for an appointment recall.",
    "A special election for an appointment recall was triggered by a petition from 65 voters in the Rancho Santa Fe School District, costing the district an estimated $40,000 to $100,000."
  ]
}
```
